bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

user.description: Choose a CoolLEDX device to set up.

send_image.name: Send image
send_image.description: Sends a still image file to the sign.

path.name: Path
path.description: Absolute path to an image file readable by Home Assistant.

send_animation.name: Send animation
send_animation.description: Sends an animation file (.jt or GIF) to the sign.

path.name: Path
path.description: Absolute path to a .jt or GIF animation file readable by Home Assistant.

display_text.name: Display text
display_text.description: Sets the message text, optionally along with color, mode, speed, brightness, and invert, in a single upload.

text.name: Text
text.description: The message text to display. Supports emoji typed directly (🎉🔥) and :shortcode: names like :fire: and :tada: (color emoji on full-color CoolLEDUX signs).

color.name: Color
color.description: RGB color to render the text in.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: CoolLEDUX display mode to apply before rendering the text.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Scroll speed to apply before rendering the text (0-255).

brightness.name: Brightness
brightness.description: Sign brightness to apply before rendering the text (0-255).

invert.name: Invert
invert.description: Rotate the rendered text 180° for this call (does not change the device's persisted orientation setting).
